seo.title: Code & Chain - Product Development & Crypto Blog
seo.description: Rita's blog: As a software engineer in crypto, I explore product development, blockchain technology, and industry trends.

aboutPage.p1: Software engineer in the crypto industry. I explore product development, economics, and the broader Web3 ecosystem while navigating the new variables in my life.
aboutPage.p2: For longer essays and one-off pieces, you’ll find them under the Personal — Personal Notes section.
